info.title: Central Landlord API
info.description:
# Central (Landlord) API

REST API for the multi-tenant SaaS commerce **central** application.

## Base URL

All documented endpoints are relative to `/api/v1`.

## Authentication

- Use **Laravel Sanctum** bearer tokens (`Authorization: Bearer {token}`).
- Obtain a token via `POST /auth/login`.
- Public auth routes (login, password reset, email verification) do not require a token.

## Response envelope

Every JSON response uses:

```json
{
  "status": true,
  "message": "Human readable summary",
  "data": {},
  "meta": {},
  "errors": null
}
```

- Validation failures return **422** with field errors in `errors`.
- Authorization failures return **403**.
- Unauthenticated requests return **401**.

## Authorization

Endpoints are gated by Spatie permissions (for example `tenants.view`, `billing.invoices.manage`).  
Central roles are seeded via `RbacSeeder` (`super-admin`, `operator`).

## Interactive docs

- Central: `/docs/central`
- Tenant: `/docs/tenant`

is_unlimited.description: Whether the feature has no enforced limit.

is_enabled.description: Whether the feature is enabled on the plan.

tracks_usage.description: Whether usage should be metered for this assignment.

reset_period.description: Usage reset interval for periodic limits.

is_available.description: Whether the feature is generally available.

tracks_usage.description: Whether usage of this feature is tracked.

two_factor_code.description: Six-digit authenticator app code when two-factor authentication is enabled.

recovery_code.description: Single-use recovery code when the authenticator app is unavailable.

LoginRequest.title: LoginRequest

amount.description: Payment amount as a decimal string.

failure_reason.description: Failure reason when payment did not succeed.

checkout_url.description: Checkout or authorization URL from the latest attempt when attempts are eager-loaded.

refunded_amount.description: Total refunded amount when refunds are eager-loaded.

guard_name.description: Authentication guard the permission belongs to.

group.description: Permission group derived from the name prefix.

is_current.description: Whether this token is the one used for the current request.

limit_type.description: Limit type value for this plan.

is_unlimited.description: Whether usage is unlimited for this plan.

is_enabled.description: Whether the feature is enabled on this plan.

tracks_usage.description: Whether usage is tracked for this assignment.

subscription.description: Trialing subscription for the selected plan.

login.description: Where the owner should authenticate next.

plan_id.description: Optional plan context for the usage event.

RecordFeatureUsageRequest.title: RecordFeatureUsageRequest

amount.description: Refunded amount as a decimal string.

is_readonly.description: Whether the setting cannot be modified via API.

sort_order.description: Display sort order within the group.
